title: Function Overloading Resolution and Ambiguity Scenarios
description: A flowchart demonstrating the decision process for resolving function overloads in C++ and identifying common causes of ambiguity.
relationships: Searches for candidate functions with matching name
Evaluates argument number and types for viability
Applies conversion rules to find best match
Flags ambiguity if no single best match exists
Generates compile-time error for ambiguous call
